deliberate_omissions: Error handling, retries, and failure behavior of the synchronization
Field mapping ownership and conflict rules
known_false_positives_rationale: Resolved by IMP-015: 'objective'/'purpose'/'aim' added to the GAP-OBJECTIVE token list.
target_fire_rationale: Words like 'api', 'endpoint', and 'integration' suppress the backend-surface and tech-deep-dive checks, yet contracts, failure behavior, and architecture input are genuinely missing. [IMP-015: detected since 2026-06-11 via mention-without-counterpart rules; kept here as the progress metric and promoted to must_fire as regression guard.]

brief.rationale: Sections 1 (objective), 2 (users) and 3 (scope) are confirmed in the requirement (see must_not_fire) yet render as TBD. IMP-024 must populate them with citations; sections 4-6 stay [PENDING INPUT]. Baseline brief_target_coverage 0.00.
